meta.notes: Conservative distribution for 60-card dev set. ~23% of cards carry a set mechanic.

slot_assignments.mechanic_usage: When this spell resolves, salvage 2. Simple common sorcery with salvage as the main effect.
Salvage 3 as ETB-style effect on a sorcery. Draw/filter variant.
"When ~ enters, salvage 2." Simple creature with salvage ETB trigger.
WU signpost uncommon. "When ~ enters, salvage 4. If you put an artifact card into your hand this way, draw a card." Ties salvage to the WU Ancient Technology archetype.
WG signpost uncommon. "When ~ enters, salvage 4." Payoff for Frontier Settlers archetype finding artifact tools.
Repeatable salvage. "{T}: Salvage 6." Powerful artifact-finding engine at rare.
"Malfunction 1" on an above-rate 2-drop creature with vigilance. Enters tapped with 1 counter, still has vigilance while malfunctioning.
"Malfunction 1" on a common artifact. Simple mana rock or utility artifact that enters tapped with a counter. Flavorful fit for ancient tech.
"Malfunction 2" creature. "When the last malfunction counter is removed from ~, deal 3 damage to any target." Reward for waiting.
WR signpost uncommon. "Malfunction 2. {1}: Remove a malfunction counter from ~." Aggressive stats with a way to speed up activation. Ties into Spark Rebellion archetype.
"Malfunction 3" with a powerful payoff. "~ has hexproof as long as it has a malfunction counter on it. When the last malfunction counter is removed, draw three cards." High complexity, high reward.
UB signpost uncommon. "When ~ enters, overclock. You may cast instant and sorcery cards exiled this way until end of your next turn." Extended window for UB's control gameplan.
"Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if you overclocked this turn, ~ deals 2 damage to each opponent." Payoff enchantment for the UR Mad Science archetype.
Mythic creature with repeatable overclock. "{2}{B}, {T}: Overclock. Whenever you overclock, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life." Powerful engine card.
